kirundi.identify_3_structures_in_the_spotter_t: Menya imiterere 3 mu Kizamini cya Spotter
kirundi.unlock_3_anatomical_mnemonics: Fungura ibimenyetso 3 byo kwibuka bya anatomi
kirundi.206_bones_support_protection_movement_: Amagufa 206 — gushyigikira, kurinda, kwimuka, kubika amabuye y'agaciro, gukora amaraso.
kirundi.houses_meninges_brain_and_cranial_nerv: Irimo meninges, ubwonko, n'utwobo tw'imyakura y'igihanga. Imisono (coronal, sagittal, lambdoid) irahurira igihe umwana agize imyaka 2.
kirundi.600_muscles_movement_posture_heat_prod: Imitsi 600+ — kwimuka, uko umuntu ahagaze, gukora ubushyuhe, guhamya ingingo.
kirundi.heart_60_000_miles_of_vessels_5l_of_bl: Umutima, kilometero 60,000 z'imitsi, litiro 5 z'amaraso — utanga O₂, intungamubiri, hormone; ukuraho imyanda.
kirundi.cns_brain_spinal_cord_and_pns_31_spina: CNS (ubwonko + uruti rw'umugongo) na PNS (amakipe 31 y'imyakura y'umugongo, amakipe 12 y'imyakura y'igihanga, sisitemu y'imyakura yigenga).
kirundi.lightest_sleep_transition_from_wakeful: Ibitotsi byoroshye cyane — guhinduka uva mu kuba maso. Kunyeganyega gahoro kw'amaso, imbaraga z'imitsi zigabanuka. Guhinda kwa hypnic (kunyeganyega kwa myoclonic) birasanzwe. Byoroshye gukanguka. Imiraba ya vertex ikarishye igaragara kuri EEG.
kirundi.true_sleep_begins_core_body_temperatur: Ibitotsi nyabyo bitangira. Ubushyuhe bwo hagati bw'umubiri buragabanuka, imikubitire y'umutima igabanuka. Sleep spindles (guturika kwa thalamocortical) birinda ibitotsi kandi bikahamya kwibuka kwo kwimuka. K-complexes ni imiraba minini yitabira ibimenyetso byo hanze.
kirundi.deep_slow_wave_sleep_sws_most_restorat: Ibitotsi byimbitse/by'umuraba gahoro (SWS). Icyiciro gisubiza imbaraga cyane. Gusohora hormone y'imikurire bigera hejuru. Sisitemu ya glymphatic isukura imyanda y'ubwonko (amyloid-β). Guhamya kwibuka gutangaza biba. Bigoye cyane gukanguka; ubunebwe bw'ibitotsi iyo ukanguwe.
kirundi.dreaming_stage_brain_is_highly_active_: Icyiciro cy'inzozi. Ubwonko burakora cyane (nk'ukuba maso) ariko umubiri urakumira (atonia binyuze mu kubuza kw'igihuru cy'ubwonko imyakura yo kwimuka). Kunyeganyega vuba kw'amaso guhuza. Gutunganya kwibuka kw'amarangamutima no gukemura ibibazo mu buhanga. Ibihe birekurura mu ijoro.
kirundi.brodmann_areas_map_52_cytoarchitectura: Uturere twa Brodmann tugaragaza uturere 52 tw'imiterere y'ingirabuzimafatizo. Igikonoshwa cy'ibanze cyo kwimuka (agace 4), igikonoshwa cy'ibanze cy'ibyiyumviro by'umubiri (utuce 3,1,2), igikonoshwa cy'ibanze cyo kubona (agace 17), igikonoshwa cy'ibanze cyo kumva (utuce 41,42). Igikonoshwa cya prefrontal ni cyo cya nyuma kubona myelin (~imyaka 25).
kirundi.purkinje_cells_are_among_the_largest_n: Ingirabuzimafatizo za Purkinje ziri mu myakura minini cyane, buri imwe yakira nka 200,000 z'inyunge za synaptic. Igikonoshwa cya cerebellar gifite ibyiciro 3: molecular, Purkinje, granular. Ubushakashatsi bushya bwerekana uruhare rwabyo mu kumva, amarangamutima, n'ururimi.
kirundi.brainstem_midbrain_pons_medulla: Igihuru cy'Ubwonko (Ubwonko bwo Hagati, Pons, Medulla)
kirundi.contains_nuclei_for_cranial_nerves_iii: Kirimo nuclei z'imyakura y'igihanga III–XII. Sisitemu ya reticular activating (RAS) ni "buto yo gucana" y'ubwonko — kwangirika bitera koma. Kwambuka kwa piramide muri medulla: kwambuka kwo kwimuka bisobanura kugenzura kwo kwimuka kw'uruhande runyuranye.
kirundi.memory_replay_during_sleep_hippocampal: Gusubiramo kwibuka mu gihe cy'ibitotsi: imyakura ya hippocampal "isubiramo" ibyabaye ku manywa mu bitotsi bya N3, yimura kwibuka kuri neocortex. Ingirabuzimafatizo za grid mu gikonoshwa cya entorhinal zitanga ibipimo by'umwanya ku ngirabuzimafatizo z'ahantu za hippocampal.
kirundi.fear_conditioning_pathway_auditory_cor: Inzira yo kwigisha ubwoba: igikonoshwa cyo kumva → amygdala y'uruhande → amygdala yo hagati → hypothalamus (igisubizo cy'umuhangayiko) + PAG (guhagarara). Imikoranire ya amygdala-prefrontal itanga uburyo bwo kugenzura amarangamutima — urufatiro rw'ubuvuzi bwa CBT.
kirundi.key_nuclei_vpl_vpm_somatosensory_relay: Nuclei z'ingenzi: VPL/VPM (koherereza ibyiyumviro by'umubiri), LGN (koherereza kubona kuri V1), MGN (koherereza kumva kuri A1), pulvinar (kwitondera), itsinda rya nuclei ryo imbere (kwibuka, uruziga rwa Papez).
kirundi.thermostat_analogy_anterior_hypothalam: Ingero ya thermostat: hypothalamus yo imbere itera gukonja (kwaguka kw'imitsi, kubira ibyuya); hypothalamus yo inyuma itera gushyuha (guhinda umushyitsi, guhina imitsi). Umuriro = urwego rwazamuwe na prostaglandins ziturutse ku ndwara.
kirundi.split_brain_experiments_revealed_hemis: Ubushakashatsi bwo kugabanya ubwonko bwagaragaje ubuhanga bw'ibice: uruhande rw'ibumoso = ururimi, ubwenge; uruhande rw'iburyo = gutunganya umwanya, byuzuye. Amakuru atangwa ku murima umwe wo kubona atunganywa n'uruhande runyuranye.
kirundi.dopamine_from_substantia_nigra_modulat: Dopamine iva muri substantia nigra igenzura inzira ziziguye (D1, ihagurutsa) n'izitaziguye (D2, ibuza). Gutakaza iki kugenzura muri Parkinson bitera ingorane zihariye zo gutangira kwimuka.
kirundi.returns_interstitial_fluid_absorbs_die: Isubiza amazi yo hagati y'ingirabuzimafatizo, inyunyuza ibinure by'ibiryo, kurinda umubiri — utubunda twa lymph 600–700, thymus, spleen.
kirundi.cervical_lymph_nodes: Utubunda twa Lymph two mu ijosi
kirundi.axillary_lymph_nodes: Utubunda twa Lymph two mu kwaha
kirundi.inguinal_lymph_nodes: Utubunda twa Lymph two mu bikonjo
kirundi.major_visceral_organs_respiration_dige: Ingingo nkuru zo mu nda — guhumeka, kugogora, gutunganya, kugenzura endocrine.
kirundi.skin_largest_organ_2m_hair_nails_gland: Uruhu (ingingo nini kurusha izindi, ~2m²), umusatsi, inzara, glande — inzitizi, kugenzura ubushyuhe, kumva, gukora vitamine D.
kirundi.oxygen_delivery_and_co_removal_12_20_b: Gutanga ogisijeni no gukuraho CO₂ — guhumeka ~12–20 ku munota, umwuka ~6L ku munota, alveoli miliyoni 300.
kirundi.hormone_producing_glands_regulate_meta: Glande zikora hormone — zigenzura metabolism, imikurire, kubyara, umuhangayiko, homeostasis binyuze mu ntumwa za chimique.
kirundi.male_and_female_reproductive_organs_ga: Ingingo z'imyororokere z'umugabo n'umugore — gukora gametes, gusama, iterambere ry'umwana wo mu nda, kugenzura hormone.
kirundi.the_circulatory_system_delivers_deoxyg: Sisitemu y'amaraso itwara amaraso adafite ogisijeni ku bihaha, aho sisitemu yo guhumeka iyuzuza ogisijeni ikanakuraho karuboni dioside binyuze mu ruhu ruto rwa alveoli-capillary.
kirundi.motor_neurons_from_the_nervous_system_: Imyakura yo kwimuka iva muri sisitemu y'imyakura isohora acetylcholine aho umwakura n'umutsi bihurira, itera guhina kw'ubwoya bw'umutsi. Nta bimenyetso by'imyakura, imitsi ntishobora kwimuka.
kirundi.muscles_attach_to_bones_via_tendons_an: Imitsi ifatana n'amagufa binyuze mu misumari kandi ikurura ku ngingo, ikora sisitemu za levier. Urwungano rw'amagufa rutanga levier zikomeye; imitsi itanga imbaraga zo gukurura.
kirundi.the_hypothalamus_pituitary_axis_releas: Umurongo wa hypothalamus-pituitary usohora FSH na LH bigenzura ingingo z'imyororokere. Estrogen, progesterone, na testosterone biva mu ngingo z'imyororokere bisubiza igisubizo kuri sisitemu ya endocrine.
kirundi.the_lymphatic_system_returns_interstit: Sisitemu ya lymph isubiza amazi yo hagati y'ingirabuzimafatizo mu maraso kandi yohereza ingirabuzimafatizo zirinda umubiri zakorewe mu ngingo za lymph. Sisitemu zombi zibungabunga homeostasis y'amazi kandi zirwanya indwara.
kirundi.the_hypothalamus_bridges_the_nervous_a: Hypothalamus ihuza sisitemu y'imyakura na endocrine — ihuza ibimenyetso by'imyakura ikabihindura amabwiriza ya hormone agenzura glande ya pituitary n'urukurikirane rwose rwa hormone ruri munsi yayo.
kirundi.the_diaphragm_and_intercostal_muscles_: Diaphragm n'imitsi yo hagati y'imbavu byaguka bikanahina umwobo w'igituza mu buryo bw'umubiri kugira ngo byimure umwuka. Ibihaha ntibifite umutsi wabyo bwite kandi byishingikiriza rwose ku mitsi ikikije.
kirundi.the_skin_contains_millions_of_speciali: Uruhu rurimo miliyoni z'impera z'imyakura zihariye n'ibyakira bipfundikijwe bimenya gukorwaho, igitutu, ubushyuhe, n'ububabare, bihora bitanga amakuru y'ibyiyumviro kuri sisitemu y'imyakura.
kirundi.portal_circulation_and_nutrient_proces: Amaraso ya Portal no Gutunganya Intungamubiri
kirundi.blood_from_the_gi_tract_drains_through: Amaraso ava mu muyoboro wa GI atemba binyuze mu mutsi wa hepatic portal aca ku mwijima mbere yo kwinjira mu maraso rusange, bituma umwijima utunganya intungamubiri mbere kandi ukavana uburozi.
kirundi.bone_marrow_blood_cell_production: Gukora Ingirabuzimafatizo z'Amaraso mu Musokoro w'Igufwa
kirundi.red_bone_marrow_inside_the_skeleton_is: Umusokoro utukura w'igufwa uri mu rwungano rw'amagufa ni aho havukira ingirabuzimafatizo zose z'amaraso. Ingirabuzimafatizo zitukura z'amaraso, ingirabuzimafatizo zera z'amaraso, na plaquettes zose zikorerwa hano binyuze mu gukora amaraso.
kirundi.cervical_lymph_nodes_2: Utubunda twa Lymph two mu ijosi
kirundi.which_structure_is_most_likely_affecte: Ni iyihe miterere ishoboka cyane kwibasirwa?
kirundi.patellofemoral_pain_syndrome_occurs_wh: Indwara y'ububabare bwa patellofemoral iba iyo igufwa ry'ivi ridatembera neza mu muferege waryo ku gufwa ry'itako. Igitutu gisubiramo kiva mu kwiruka gitera kubabara kwa cartilage. Ubuvuzi burimo gukomeza quad, guhamya urukiro, no guhindura ibikorwa.
kirundi.which_structure_is_most_likely_torn: Ni iyihe miterere ishoboka cyane gutabuka?
kirundi.the_supraspinatus_is_the_most_commonly: Supraspinatus ni umutsi wa rotator cuff utabuka cyane. Unyura munsi ya acromion aho uhura n'igitutu no gutabuka. Akazi ko hejuru y'umutwe nko gusiga irangi kongera iki kaga cyane.
kirundi.racing_heart_after_exercise: Umutima Ukubita Vuba Nyuma yo Kwimenyereza Umubiri
kirundi.which_structure_controls_the_normal_he: Ni iyihe miterere igenzura imikubitire isanzwe y'umutima?
kirundi.the_sa_node_in_the_right_atrium_is_the: SA node iri mu atrium y'iburyo ni pacemaker karemano y'umutima. Mu gihe cyo kwimenyereza umubiri gukomeye, adrenaline ishobora gutera imikubitire itagira ingaruka mbi mu gihe imikubitire y'umutima ihindagurika. Arrhythmias zikomeza zigomba gusuzumwa kugira ngo hakurweho indwara y'umutima y'imiterere.
kirundi.median_nerve_carpal_tunnel_syndrome: Umwakura wa median (indwara ya carpal tunnel)
kirundi.carpal_tunnel_syndrome_is_compression_: Indwara ya carpal tunnel ni ukwandamizwa kw'umwakura wa median munsi ya flexor retinaculum ku ijoro ry'ukuboko. Umwakura wa median utanga ibyiyumviro ku rutoki runini n'intoki 3.5 za mbere. Gukoresha ijoro ry'ukuboko kenshi ni impamvu ikomeye y'akaga.
kirundi.what_diagnosis_must_be_urgently_ruled_: Ni iyihe ndwara igomba gukurwaho byihutirwa?
kirundi.painless_lymphadenopathy_with_b_sympto: Kubyimba kw'utubunda twa lymph bidababaza, hamwe n'ibimenyetso bya B (ibyuya by'ijoro, gutakaza ibiro, umuriro) ni ikimenyetso gisanzwe cya Hodgkin lymphoma ku basore. Biopsy yerekana ingirabuzimafatizo za Reed-Sternberg yemeza isuzuma.
kirundi.which_cells_failed_and_what_is_the_eme: Ni izihe ngirabuzimafatizo zananiwe, kandi ni iyihe mimerere y'ihutirwa?
kirundi.beta_cells_of_islets_of_langerhans_dia: Ingirabuzimafatizo beta za islets of Langerhans; Diabetic Ketoacidosis (DKA)
kirundi.without_insulin_from_beta_cells_glucos: Nta insuline iva mu ngirabuzimafatizo beta, glucose ntishobora kwinjira mu ngirabuzimafatizo. Umubiri utwika ibinure, ukora ketones zituma amaraso aba acide. Guhumeka kwa Kussmaul kwishyura mu gusohora CO2. Ubuvuzi: amazi ya IV, insuline drip, no gusimbura electrolyte.
kirundi.why_is_the_middle_third_of_the_clavicl: Kuki igice cya gatatu cyo hagati cya clavicle ari aho havunika cyane?
kirundi.the_middle_third_is_thinnest_and_has_n: Igice cya gatatu cyo hagati ni cyo gito kandi nta gukomeza kw'imitsi
kirundi.the_clavicle_is_the_most_frequently_fr: Clavicle ni igufwa rivunika kenshi. Igice cyaryo cya gatatu cyo hagati ni cyo gito kandi nta kurinda kw'imitsi. Imbaraga ziva mu kugwa ku kuboko kwagurutswe zikusanyirizwa kuri iki gice gifite intege nke. Byinshi bikira binyuze mu guhambira ukuboko.
kirundi.why_does_altitude_cause_these_symptoms: Kuki ubutumburuke butera ibi bimenyetso, kandi ni iyihe miterere ihura n'igitutu cyane?
kirundi.the_alveoli_and_respiratory_muscles_re: Alveoli n'imitsi yo guhumeka; ogisijeni y'ikirere yagabanutse itera hypoxia
kirundi.at_high_altitude_atmospheric_pressure_: Ku butumburuke buhanitse, igitutu cy'ikirere kiragabanuka, kigabanya igitutu cy'igice cya ogisijeni. Ogisijeni nke inyura mu ruhu rwa alveoli. Umubiri wishyura mu guhumeka vuba no cyane, wongera akazi k'imitsi yo guhumeka.
kirundi.follow_a_red_blood_cell_through_the_en: Kurikira ingirabuzimafatizo itukura y'amaraso mu maraso yose.
kirundi.deoxygenated_blood_from_the_body_enter: Amaraso adafite ogisijeni ava mu mubiri yinjira mu atrium y'iburyo binyuze muri vena cava yo hejuru n'iyo hasi.
kirundi.blood_passes_through_the_tricuspid_val: Amaraso anyura muri valve ya tricuspid yinjira mu ventricle y'iburyo, iyisunika ku bihaha.
kirundi.the_right_ventricle_ejects_blood_throu: Ventricle y'iburyo isohora amaraso binyuze muri valve ya pulmonary muri imitsi ya pulmonary ku bihaha byombi.
kirundi.in_the_alveolar_capillaries_co2_is_rel: Muri capillaries za alveoli, CO2 isohorwa naho O2 ifatwa binyuze mu ruhu ruto rwa alveoli.
kirundi.freshly_oxygenated_blood_returns_to_th: Amaraso amaze kubona ogisijeni asubira ku mutima binyuze mu mitsi ine ya pulmonary.
kirundi.the_four_pulmonary_veins_empty_oxygena: Imitsi ine ya pulmonary isuka amaraso afite ogisijeni mu atrium y'ibumoso, yuzura hanyuma ikayisunika binyuze muri valve ya mitral.
kirundi.blood_passes_through_the_mitral_valve_: Amaraso anyura muri valve ya mitral yinjira mu ventricle y'ibumoso ifite imitsi, icyumba gikomeye kurusha ibindi cy'umutima.
kirundi.the_left_ventricle_powerfully_ejects_b: Ventricle y'ibumoso isohora amaraso ku mbaraga binyuze muri valve ya aorta muri aorta, umuhanda munini w'umubiri.
kirundi.arteries_branch_into_arterioles_and_ca: Imitsi igabanyamo arterioles na capillaries aho O2 n'intungamubiri bitangwa naho CO2/imyanda bikusanywa.
kirundi.deoxygenated_blood_returns_through_ven: Amaraso adafite ogisijeni asubira binyuze muri venules n'imitsi, afashijwe na pompe z'imitsi na valve, kugeza ku atrium y'iburyo.
kirundi.trace_the_journey_of_a_breath_of_air_f: Kurikira urugendo rw'umwuka wo guhumeka uhereye ku izuru kugeza kuri alveoli no gusubira.
kirundi.air_enters_through_the_nostrils_and_is: Umwuka winjira binyuze mu mwenge w'izuru maze ushyushwa, ukanywebwa amazi, ukayungururwa binyuze mu ruhu rw'imyanda na turbinates.
kirundi.air_passes_through_the_nasopharynx_and: Umwuka unyura muri nasopharynx na oropharynx, inzira isangiwe n'inzira y'ibiryo.
kirundi.air_crosses_the_vocal_cords_in_the_voi: Umwuka wambuka imiringoti y'ijwi mu gasanduku k'ijwi. Epiglottis irinda ibiryo kwinjira mu nzira y'umwuka.
kirundi.the_trachea_windpipe_is_reinforced_by_: Umuyoboro w'umwuka ukomezwa n'impeta za cartilage zifite ishusho rya C. Cilia zimura mucus hejuru kugira ngo zifate imyanda.
kirundi.the_trachea_splits_into_left_and_right: Umuyoboro w'umwuka ugabanyamo bronchi nkuru z'ibumoso n'iz'iburyo, buri imwe yinjira mu ihaha rimwe. Zigabanyamo bronchioles nto.
kirundi.300_million_grape_like_sacs_where_gas_: Utubuto miliyoni 300 tumeze nk'inzabibu aho guhererekanya gaze biba. O2 ikwira mu maraso; CO2 ikwira hanze. Ubuso bungana n'ikibuga cya tennis.
kirundi.the_diaphragm_relaxes_and_rises_reduci: Diaphragm iruhuka ikazamuka, igabanya ingano y'ihaha. Umwuka ukungahaye kuri CO2 usunikwa hanze binyuze mu nzira imwe mu buryo bunyuranye.
kirundi.follow_a_meal_from_mouth_through_the_e: Kurikira ifunguro uhereye mu kanwa mu buryo bwose bwo kugogora.
kirundi.teeth_mechanically_break_food_down_sal: Amenyo amena ibiryo mu buryo bw'imashini. Amylase y'amacandwe itangira kugogora amidon. Ururimi rukora ibiryo bikaba bolus.
kirundi.swallowing_pushes_the_bolus_past_the_e: Kumira gusunika bolus inyura ku epiglottis. Imiraba ya péristaltique iyimura hasi ya œsophage ya cm 25 mu masegonda 8 hafi.
kirundi.gastric_acid_ph_1_5_3_5_and_pepsin_bre: Acide y'igifu (pH 1.5-3.5) na pepsine bimena poroteyine. Kuvanga bikora chyme mu masaha 2-4.
kirundi.the_first_25cm_of_the_small_intestine_: Cm 25 za mbere z'amara mato zakira bile iva ku mwijima/agasabo k'inzura na enzymes ziva ku pancréas.
kirundi.most_nutrient_absorption_occurs_here_v: Kunyunyuza intungamubiri kwinshi biba hano binyuze muri villi na microvilli, byongera ubuso inshuro 600. Uburebure bwa metero 6-7.
kirundi.water_and_electrolytes_are_reabsorbed_: Amazi na electrolytes binyunyuzwa bundi bushya. Bagiteri z'amara zibora fibre isigaye, zikora vitamine K na B12.
kirundi.waste_is_compacted_and_stored_in_the_r: Imyanda ikandamizwa ikabikwa muri rectum kugeza igihe cyo kwituma. Urugendo rwose rufata amasaha 24-72.
kirundi.trace_a_reflex_arc_from_stimulus_to_re: Kurikira arc ya réflexe uhereye ku ntandaro kugeza ku gisubizo.
kirundi.a_sensory_receptor_in_the_skin_detects: Uwakira ibyiyumviro mu ruhu (nko gukoraho ku buso bushyushye) amenya intandaro y'ububabare akakora ikimenyetso cy'amashanyarazi.
kirundi.the_signal_travels_along_a_sensory_aff: Ikimenyetso kigenda ku mwakura w'ibyiyumviro (afférent) kugeza ku ruti rw'umugongo ku muvuduko ugera kuri 120 m/s binyuze mu kohereza saltatoire.
kirundi.in_the_dorsal_horn_the_sensory_neuron_: Mu ihembe ryo hepfo, umwakura w'ibyiyumviro ukora synapse na interneuron. Ku baréflexe, ikimenyetso ntikigomba kugera ku bwonko.
kirundi.the_interneuron_in_the_spinal_gray_mat: Interneuron mu kintu cy'ivu cy'uruti rw'umugongo uhuza ikimenyetso ukakigeza ku mwakura wo kwimuka.
kirundi.the_motor_efferent_neuron_carries_the_: Umwakura wo kwimuka (efférent) utwara ikimenyetso cy'itegeko uhereye ku ihembe ryo imbere kugeza ku mutsi ugenewe.
kirundi.acetylcholine_released_at_the_neuromus: Acetylcholine isohorwa aho umwakura n'umutsi bihurira itera guhina kw'umutsi. Ukurura ukuboko kwawe mbere yo kumva ububabare.
kirundi.meanwhile_a_copy_of_the_signal_ascends: Muri icyo gihe, kopi y'ikimenyetso izamuka ku gikonoshwa cy'ibyiyumviro by'umubiri. Wumva ububabare mu bwenge nyuma ya segonda 0.5 nyuma ya réflexe.
kirundi.sorry_i_could_not_connect_to_the_ai_tu: Ihangane, sinashoboye guhuza n'umwarimu wa AI ubu.
kirundi.ai_tutor_is_not_available_in_this_envi: Umwarimu wa AI ntaboneka muri iki gihe.
kirundi.click_any_organ_to_see_its_structure_f: Kanda ku ngingo iyo ari yo yose kugira ngo urebe imiterere yayo, imikorere yayo, n'aho ihuriye. Shyira hejuru kugira ngo ubone ibirango byoroshye; kanda kugira ngo ubone ibisobanuro birambuye.
kirundi.step_through_each_major_part_in_pedago: Nyura mu buri gice kinini mu buryo bwo kwigisha. Inzira nziza cyane ku bigira bwa mbere — ihuza imiterere → imikorere → guhuza mu kurebamo rimwe.
kirundi.no_system_works_alone_the_kidney_filte: Nta sisitemu ikora yonyine. Impyiko iyungurura amaraso (umutima n'imitsi), isubiza ADH (endocrine), isohora urée (igicuruzwa cyo kugogora). Shaka amahuriro.
kirundi.ask_a_question_about_the_active_organ_: Baza ikibazo ku ngingo cyangwa sisitemu ikora. Umwarimu azi ibiri ku mugaragaza kandi ahuza ibisubizo n'urwego rwawe rw'ishuri.
kirundi.click_the_named_structure_on_the_diagr: Kanda ku miterere yiswe ku ishusho. Yubaka akamenyero ko gukanda-ikintu ibizamini bya AP n'iby'ubuvuzi byishingikirizaho.
kirundi.follow_blood_air_food_or_signals_throu: Kurikira amaraso, umwuka, ibiryo, cyangwa ibimenyetso mu mubiri ku murongo. Inzira ni uburyo ukuri gutandukanye kuba sisitemu ushobora gutekerezaho.
kirundi.quick_recall_cards_with_spaced_repetit: Amakarita yo kwibuka vuba afite gusubiramo mu ntera. Isuzuma ry'amasegonda atandatu ubu riruta gusoma bundi bushya iminota itanu ejo — iyo ni ingaruka yo kwipimisha.
kirundi.adjust_the_sliders_to_keep_each_body_v: Hindura ba-slider kugira ngo buri mpinduka y'umubiri ibe mu rwego rwayo rwiza, kandi urebe uko sisitemu zikorana kugira ngo zibungabunge uburinganire.
kirundi.reset_all_layers_to_default_skin_only: Subiza ibyiciro byose ku ntangiriro (uruhu gusa)
kirundi.switch_between_male_and_female_reprodu: Hindura hagati ya anatomi y'imyororokere y'umugabo n'umugore
kirundi.exception_the_pulmonary_artery_carries: Uretse: umutsi wa pulmonary utwara amaraso adafite ogisijeni (ubururu), imitsi ya pulmonary itwara amaraso afite ogisijeni (umutuku).
kirundi.which_structure_has_this_function: Ni iyihe miterere ifite iyi mikorere?
kirundi.which_body_system_contains_this_struct: Ni iyihe sisitemu y'umubiri irimo iyi miterere?
kirundi.ask_a_question_about_anatomy_to_get_st: Baza ikibazo kuri anatomi kugira ngo utangire!
kirundi.ask_the_anatomy_ai_tutor_a_question: Baza umwarimu wa anatomi wa AI ikibazo
kirundi.no_tour_available_for_this_system: Nta ruzinduko ruhari kuri iyi sisitemu.
kirundi.a_pin_is_placed_on_the_anatomical_figu: Pini ishyizwe ku ishusho ya anatomi. Menya imiterere vuba uko ushoboye! Shaka crosshair ikubita kuri canvas.
kirundi.what_structure_is_marked_on_the_figure: Ni iyihe miterere yashyizweho ikimenyetso ku ishusho?
kirundi.trace_step_by_step_how_blood_flows_air: Kurikira intambwe ku ntambwe uko amaraso atemba, umwuka ugenda, ibiryo bigogorwa, cyangwa ibimenyetso by'imyakura bigenda mu mubiri.
kirundi.no_flashcards_available_for_this_compl: Nta makarita ahari kuri uru rwego rw'ubukomere.
kirundi.all_vital_signs_within_physiologic_ran: Ibimenyetso by'ingenzi byose biri mu rwego rw'umubiri.
kirundi.compensatory_mechanisms_activated_body: Uburyo bwo kwishyura bwatangiye. Umubiri usubiza inzego.
kirundi.multiple_systems_strained_risk_of_deco: Sisitemu nyinshi zahanganye. Akaga ko kunanirwa.
kirundi.acid_base_glucose_thermal_disturbance_: Ihungabana rya acide-base + glucose + ubushyuhe biruta kwishyura.
kirundi.hypothesis_free_text_which_vital_sign_: Igitekerezo (inyandiko yigenga): Ni ikihe kimenyetso cy'ingenzi cyihanganira ihindagurika rito cyane?
kirundi.hold_two_vital_signs_steady_move_the_t: Fata ibimenyetso bibiri by'ingenzi bihamye. Nyeganyeza icya gatatu. Reba.
kirundi.real_human_ph_range_is_7_35_7_45_inves: Urwego rwa pH y'umuntu nyawe ni 7.35-7.45. Shakashaka impamvu ari rwiza cyane.
kirundi.find_two_settings_producing_critical_s: Shaka amagenamiterere abiri akora imimerere ikomeye. Bisangira iki?
kirundi.explain_why_homeostasis_is_fragile_to_: Sobanura impamvu homeostasis yoroshye ku ihindagurika ry'impinduka nyinshi.
kirundi.design_note_discrete_4_state_vital_mar: Inyandiko y'igishushanyo: ikimenyetso cy'ingenzi cy'imimerere 4 itandukanye; nta manota y'ivuriro; nta kwerekana — ku bushake.
